content: The 2025 episodic memory transformer agent’s core advantage of storing and retrieving context-specific interaction traces can be repurposed to create a shared cross-agent episodic memory bank for A2A protocols, enabling curious active learning agents to collectively build a shared library of past successful and failed interaction patterns. This shared memory bank would outperform current isolated curiosity-driven reinforcement learning by letting agents directly learn from each other’s exploratory trajectories instead of re-discovering knowledge independently.
